chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So till now we have talked about how we can select some of our HTML elements from DOM

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can select their proper list according to different CSS selectors

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: or we can select individual elements and change their properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So we have learnt selecting of the elements

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now we will talk about manipulating the elements in DOM manipulation

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is how we can change the properties of the objects in our JavaScript and bring changes in our HTML document

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Basically we can bring changes in the screen that we can see

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So first of all we will talk about some specific properties and methods

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In which we will talk about text based and content based properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In this we will talk about three properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Our inner text, text content and inner HTML property

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Generally we can see these three properties in all the objects that we have

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Let's take an example and understand it

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In our index.html we have already made a paragraph and we can see a lot of content in this paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What we will do is we will select this paragraph in our JavaScript

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So here we can make a variable

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Para is equal to document.querySelector

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In querySelector we will select our paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So the paragraph that we will get will have this value

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and this is our highlighted paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now if we go to the paragraph that we have, we can print it with our different properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So we will do console.dir para

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: From that we will get different properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and we can bring changes in these properties and bring changes in our HTML

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So first of all we will focus on content based properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In content based properties we will talk about three properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we scroll here, then the first property that we will cover is our inner HTML

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Along with this we will talk about inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and along with that there is another property called text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now these three properties look similar

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is, if we want we can print all three for our object

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can print para.innerText

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: After that we can print para.innerHTML

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and after that we can print para.textContent

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and when we see the value of these four, we will see a very similar value

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: This is our inner text, this is our inner HTML and this is our text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and all three are very similar

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we talk about inner text, let's talk about their definition

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What does our inner text do?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It shows us the text, all the visible text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is, all the text that is visible on the screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: All that text is contained in this node

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: With the help of inner content, it shows us full text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is, it is possible that some things are hidden in our text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It is possible that we have hidden some text visibility in our paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: and have turned off the display

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So what will happen in that case?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In that case, we will not be able to see those things on the screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So those things will be visible in the text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: but not in the inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Because inner text shows the same part that is visible on the screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: While text content shows the entire content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And inner HTML shows us the entire HTML markup

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That we did not use any bold tag, we did not use any anchor tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We did not use any internal styling

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So we get to know these things from inner HTML

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So we can see those differences here too

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What did inner text do?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It showed us all the text that is being displayed here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is, it is visible on our page

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What does inner HTML do?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It shows the same text but also shows HTML markup

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is, which tag has been used

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we notice carefully, this bold tag has been used here to write spiderman

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: While here we will simply see spiderman in the inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We know that the Marvel comics that has been printed here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: is actually an anchor tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But we will not get to know this anchor tag in the inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We will get to know this anchor tag here in our inner HTML

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And the difference between inner HTML and text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Actually, text content also shows us the text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But in text content, you will notice that there are some spaces in between

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And these are very random spaces

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We notice that these spaces have nothing to do with this page

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That means, what happened after comics?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: A next line has been added

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But on our page, there is no next line after comics

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That means, comics is ending here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So after that, no next line is printed

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then why is this slash n showing us?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: While slash n is used for next line

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Actually, the way text is shown in text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That is very similar to how we wrote our text in index.html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Like here in index.html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we have written the text in this way

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then our text content will also be printed in the same way

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Like here, the first line starts with bold tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And the first line ends with books

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So here also, the first line starts with our spiderman

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And ends with books

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What comes to books? Backslash n

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Which is for next line

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then in next line, we have printed only published by

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So published by

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And after that, a next line comes again

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So here, this backslash n, backslash n, backslash n

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Is shown again and again

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It is shown because when our line has ended in index.html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So text content shows what we have written in index.html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In fact, inner text shows what is being printed on our screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And inner html shows what was the markup of our html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now, it is fine with inner html, we got the markup

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Let's understand the differences between inner text and our text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Let's suppose, we have this anchor tag in our paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And we want to make this anchor tag display none

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: How can we make it display none?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can go to inline style and set the display to none

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: As soon as we set the display to none

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We will not be able to see marvel comics

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We will refresh the page

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And now we can see that after published by

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Marvel comics is not visible anywhere in the entire paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: First, we will write our paragraph

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And for para, we will print our inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: After printing the inner text, we can see that published by is nothing

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Means nothing is visible

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we print text content, we can see that after published by

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Marvel comics is visible

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Marvel comics is visible here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But after published by, this word, this sentence, this anchor tag is not visible

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So how is marvel comics visible in text content?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Because text content, our textual content is being taken from html file

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Whereas, inner text, what is visible on our screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It is taken from there

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: There is a very important difference

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Which we should remember now

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Between these three properties

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Inner text gives us the text which is visible on our screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Our inner html gives us the entire html markup

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And text content gives us the text which is written in the actual html file

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now it is possible that we hide some content in the html file

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We make its visibility none, display none

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then what will happen?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That content will not be visible on the screen

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then it will not be visible in our inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But it will be visible in text content

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So we understood the differences

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now let's talk about manipulation

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: For manipulation, our para, i.e. this entire para

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can change its value by setting the inner text property

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we set inner text to abc

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then what will happen?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: The value of the entire paragraph will be removed

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And its value will be set to abc

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now if we want that instead of abc

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It should come here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Hi, I am Peter Parker

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Enter it

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then this line will be printed

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So basically whenever we set the inner text property of our paragraph to some value

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then the value will be changed here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But if we want to make some things bold in the inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Let's suppose we want to make Peter Parker bold

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then we can write it in our bold tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Something like this

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So that thing will not be possible

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Because inner text considers all things as text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: It does not consider them as html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So our bold tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Will be printed as it is

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Whereas

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we had entered inner html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then what would have happened?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In that case, the tag would have been recognized

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So here

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Peter Parker

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Would have been bold

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So this is the difference

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: When we want to set some content like this

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In which we want to pass our html markup

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can use inner html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: When we want to give normal text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can use inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now let's suppose this is our main heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And if we want to underline this main heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then what can we do in that case?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: First of all, we will access it

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Let heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Is equal to document

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Dot

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Query selector

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And we will select our h1 heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can also print the value of our heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Heading dot inner

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So heading dot inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Is our main heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So heading dot inner text is equal to spiderman

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: If we want to underline this heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then to underline

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can use styles

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: But we haven't talked about styling

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: How to manipulate style

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So for underline, we can use our underline tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now we know

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: The value of this is spiderman

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So what can we do?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can write heading dot inner html

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Is equal to

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In double quotes

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can write underline

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Spiderman

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And again our underline tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Is over

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So what happened? Our main heading is underlined

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Along with this, we can use one more thing

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Like if we refresh

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Again our heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We will get it

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We know the value of our heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: That this is my main heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Now if we want to use

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Existing text of this heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So inner html is equal to

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Underline tags

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Here instead of double quotes

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can use back text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: As soon as we use back text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Then we will use our underline tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And in underline tag

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We want to write a variable

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So to write a variable

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can use our heading dot inner text

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So this time we don't need to remember

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What was the text in our heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can remember that and write it again

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: What we can do simply?

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: We can use our back text logic

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: In that we can write the part

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Like a string

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And we can use the rest of the part like a variable

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So basically whatever value is already in the heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: You can pass it in underline

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And the final value

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Will be underlined

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: And we will assign it to our inner html property

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So in this way

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Whatever content will be in the heading

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Will be underlined

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So the changes we have made

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Are called DOM manipulation

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: Because we have started manipulating our html elements

chunks.title: Setting Content in Objects
chunks.text: So you can see the link here on the page

text: So till now we have talked about how we can select some of our HTML elements from DOM We can select their proper list according to different CSS selectors or we can select individual elements and change their properties So we have learnt selecting of the elements Now we will talk about manipulating the elements in DOM manipulation That is how we can change the properties of the objects in our JavaScript and bring changes in our HTML document Basically we can bring changes in the screen that we can see So first of all we will talk about some specific properties and methods In which we will talk about text based and content based properties In this we will talk about three properties Our inner text, text content and inner HTML property Generally we can see these three properties in all the objects that we have Let's take an example and understand it In our index.html we have already made a paragraph and we can see a lot of content in this paragraph What we will do is we will select this paragraph in our JavaScript So here we can make a variable Para is equal to document.querySelector In querySelector we will select our paragraph So the paragraph that we will get will have this value and this is our highlighted paragraph Now if we go to the paragraph that we have, we can print it with our different properties So we will do console.dir para From that we will get different properties and we can bring changes in these properties and bring changes in our HTML So first of all we will focus on content based properties In content based properties we will talk about three properties If we scroll here, then the first property that we will cover is our inner HTML Along with this we will talk about inner text and along with that there is another property called text content Now these three properties look similar That is, if we want we can print all three for our object We can print para.innerText After that we can print para.innerHTML and after that we can print para.textContent and when we see the value of these four, we will see a very similar value This is our inner text, this is our inner HTML and this is our text content and all three are very similar If we talk about inner text, let's talk about their definition What does our inner text do? It shows us the text, all the visible text That is, all the text that is visible on the screen All that text is contained in this node With the help of inner content, it shows us full text That is, it is possible that some things are hidden in our text content It is possible that we have hidden some text visibility in our paragraph and have turned off the display So what will happen in that case? In that case, we will not be able to see those things on the screen So those things will be visible in the text content but not in the inner text Because inner text shows the same part that is visible on the screen While text content shows the entire content And inner HTML shows us the entire HTML markup That we did not use any bold tag, we did not use any anchor tag We did not use any internal styling So we get to know these things from inner HTML So we can see those differences here too What did inner text do? It showed us all the text that is being displayed here That is, it is visible on our page What does inner HTML do? It shows the same text but also shows HTML markup That is, which tag has been used If we notice carefully, this bold tag has been used here to write spiderman While here we will simply see spiderman in the inner text We know that the Marvel comics that has been printed here is actually an anchor tag But we will not get to know this anchor tag in the inner text We will get to know this anchor tag here in our inner HTML And the difference between inner HTML and text content Actually, text content also shows us the text But in text content, you will notice that there are some spaces in between And these are very random spaces We notice that these spaces have nothing to do with this page That means, what happened after comics? A next line has been added But on our page, there is no next line after comics That means, comics is ending here So after that, no next line is printed Then why is this slash n showing us? While slash n is used for next line Actually, the way text is shown in text content That is very similar to how we wrote our text in index.html Like here in index.html If we have written the text in this way Then our text content will also be printed in the same way Like here, the first line starts with bold tag And the first line ends with books So here also, the first line starts with our spiderman And ends with books What comes to books? Backslash n Which is for next line Then in next line, we have printed only published by So published by And after that, a next line comes again So here, this backslash n, backslash n, backslash n Is shown again and again It is shown because when our line has ended in index.html So text content shows what we have written in index.html In fact, inner text shows what is being printed on our screen And inner html shows what was the markup of our html Now, it is fine with inner html, we got the markup Let's understand the differences between inner text and our text content Let's suppose, we have this anchor tag in our paragraph And we want to make this anchor tag display none How can we make it display none? We can go to inline style and set the display to none As soon as we set the display to none We will not be able to see marvel comics We will refresh the page And now we can see that after published by Marvel comics is not visible anywhere in the entire paragraph First, we will write our paragraph And for para, we will print our inner text After printing the inner text, we can see that published by is nothing Means nothing is visible If we print text content, we can see that after published by Marvel comics is visible Marvel comics is visible here But after published by, this word, this sentence, this anchor tag is not visible So how is marvel comics visible in text content? Because text content, our textual content is being taken from html file Whereas, inner text, what is visible on our screen It is taken from there There is a very important difference Which we should remember now Between these three properties Inner text gives us the text which is visible on our screen Our inner html gives us the entire html markup And text content gives us the text which is written in the actual html file Now it is possible that we hide some content in the html file We make its visibility none, display none Then what will happen? That content will not be visible on the screen Then it will not be visible in our inner text But it will be visible in text content So we understood the differences Now let's talk about manipulation For manipulation, our para, i.e. this entire para We can change its value by setting the inner text property If we set inner text to abc Then what will happen? The value of the entire paragraph will be removed And its value will be set to abc Now if we want that instead of abc It should come here Hi, I am Peter Parker Enter it Then this line will be printed So basically whenever we set the inner text property of our paragraph to some value Then the value will be changed here But if we want to make some things bold in the inner text Let's suppose we want to make Peter Parker bold Then we can write it in our bold tag Something like this So that thing will not be possible Because inner text considers all things as text It does not consider them as html So our bold tag Will be printed as it is Whereas If we had entered inner html Then what would have happened? In that case, the tag would have been recognized So here Peter Parker Would have been bold So this is the difference When we want to set some content like this In which we want to pass our html markup We can use inner html When we want to give normal text We can use inner text Now let's suppose this is our main heading And if we want to underline this main heading Then what can we do in that case?
